tagline: Trusted Pool Service and Repair in Palm Beach

hero.headline:
Your Pool Deserves Andy's
Personal Touch
hero.subheadline: Owner Andy Brody personally handles every service call — no random techs, no runaround. Palm Beach's highest-rated pool company delivers honest advice, fair pricing, and the kind of meticulous care that earned 150+ five-star reviews.

services.label: Our Pool Services
services.headline: Complete Pool Care From<br class="hidden md:block">One Trusted Expert
services.subtitle: From routine weekly cleaning to complex equipment repairs and full remodels, Andy and his team handle it all — so you never have to juggle multiple contractors or worry about your pool again.

cards.title: Weekly Pool Cleaning
cards.description: Comprehensive weekly cleaning and chemical balancing that keeps your pool crystal clear, safe, and swim-ready every single week — year-round in South Florida.

cards.title: Equipment Repair
cards.description: Expert repair of pumps, heaters, filters, and salt systems from Hayward, Jandy, and Pentair. Most repairs completed same-visit by Andy himself.

cards.title: Heater Service & Install
cards.description: Professional pool heater tune-ups, repairs, and new installations so you can extend your swim season with reliable warm water all winter long.

cards.title: Leak Detection
cards.description: Advanced leak detection technology pinpoints water loss issues fast. Andy identifies the source and gets it fixed — saving you money on water and chemicals.

cards.title: Resurfacing & Plaster
cards.description: Premium resurfacing with Diamond Brite, Pebble Tec, and Florida Gem finishes. Transform your worn pool surface into something beautiful and long-lasting.

cards.title: Remodeling & Upgrades
cards.description: LED lighting, automation systems, water features, and modern equipment upgrades installed by a licensed contractor. Control your pool from your phone.

how_it_works.headline: Three Steps to Worry-Free Pool Care

steps.title: Call or Text Andy Directly
steps.description: No call centers, no runaround. Reach Andy at 561-660-6062 and describe what your pool needs. You'll get an honest assessment and a fair quote within 24 hours.

steps.title: Andy Handles It Personally
steps.description: Every job is performed or directly overseen by Andy himself. Licensed, insured, and backed by 14 years of Palm Beach pool expertise — your pool is in the best hands.

steps.title: Enjoy Your Perfect Pool
steps.description: Relax knowing your pool is clean, safe, and running efficiently. If anything isn't perfect, Andy comes back and makes it right — that's his personal guarantee.

about.label: Why Palm Beach Trusts Andy
about.headline: Owner-Operated Means Every Pool Gets Personal Attention
about.description: Andy Brody started Palm Beach Pool & Spa Service in 2012 with one truck and a simple promise: treat every pool like it's his own. 14 years and 150+ five-star reviews later, that promise hasn't changed. Andy still personally handles or oversees every service call, giving you the kind of honest advice and meticulous care that big companies simply can't match. Licensed, insured, and certified across Hayward, Jandy, and Pentair equipment.

features.title: Owner On Every Job
features.description: Andy personally handles or supervises every single service call. You'll never deal with an untrained tech or a stranger in your backyard.

features.title: Fair, Transparent Pricing
features.description: No hidden fees, no surprise charges, no upselling. Andy quotes honestly and sticks to it. If he finds something unexpected, he calls you first.

features.title: All Major Brands Serviced
features.description: Certified to work on Hayward, Jandy, and Pentair equipment. Whatever your pool runs on, Andy knows it inside and out.

pricing.headline: Fair Pricing. Zero Hidden Fees.
pricing.subtitle: Andy believes in honest quotes and straightforward pricing. No contracts, no cancellation penalties — just great pool care at a fair price.

guarantee.headline: Andy's Personal Guarantee
guarantee.description: If you're not 100% satisfied with any service visit, Andy will come back personally and make it right — no questions asked, no extra charge. He's staked his reputation on delivering exceptional pool care for 14 years, and he's not about to stop now. Your satisfaction isn't just a policy; it's Andy's word.

faqs.question: How quickly can Andy start service?
faqs.answer: Most new clients are on the schedule within a few days. For urgent repairs or green pool emergencies, Andy often responds the same day or next day. Just call 561-660-6062 and he'll work with your timeline.

faqs.question: Does Andy personally do the work?
faqs.answer: Yes. Andy personally handles or directly oversees every single service call. You'll never get a random technician — just a licensed, insured pool expert who knows your pool and your preferences.

faqs.question: What brands of equipment do you service?
faqs.answer: Andy services all major brands including Hayward, Jandy, and Pentair. Whether it's a pump, heater, filter, or salt system, he has the expertise and parts access to get it fixed right.

faqs.question: Do I need to sign a contract?
faqs.answer: Never. Andy doesn't believe in locking you in. You can adjust, pause, or cancel service anytime with zero fees. He earns your business every visit — that's the way it should be.

faqs.question: What areas in Palm Beach do you serve?
faqs.answer: Andy serves Palm Beach Gardens, Jupiter, North Palm Beach, West Palm Beach, Royal Palm Beach, Wellington, Palm Beach, Juno Beach, and Loxahatchee. If you're in the greater Palm Beach area, give him a call.

testimonials.name: Jan D.
testimonials.text: He showed up, took complete ownership of the problem and got our pool looking good again in a short amount of time. I've tried other companies but Andy is the real deal.

testimonials.name: Rhicel P.
testimonials.text: Andy is the best! He is always on time, and communicates very well regarding any pool needs. I trust him completely with our pool and wouldn't use anyone else.

testimonials.name: ThreeBestRated Customer
testimonials.text: Andy runs a tight ship and his pool services are the very best in service. I have had 5 Pool Companies in the past and Palm Beach Pool and Spa is by far the best out there.

contact.subtitle: Call Andy directly or fill out the form below. You'll get an honest assessment and a fair quote — no pressure, no obligation, no sales pitch.
